title: JCB 3w = 35w / 5w = 50w LED GU10 100deg 3000k (Warm) / 6500k (Daylight) (3w (35w), 3000k (Warm White))
features: Energy-Efficient Replacement: Replaces traditional 35W halogen bulbs with a highly efficient 4W LED, reducing energy consumption.
Warm and Inviting Lighting: Emits a cozy 3,000K Warm White light with 250 lumens, creating a welcoming atmosphere in any space.
Wide 100-Degree Beam Angle: Offers broad coverage and even distribution of light, making it suitable for various applications.
Non-Dimmable Convenience: Designed for simplicity, this bulb is non-dimmable, providing straightforward on/off functionality.
Voltage Compatibility: Operates on a standard 220-240V electrical supply, ensuring easy installation in most settings.
description: Upgrade to Energy Efficiency: Say goodbye to traditional halogen bulbs with our JCB 4w LED GU10 bulb. This 4W LED bulb is a powerful and energy-efficient replacement for 35W halogen bulbs, allowing you to brighten up your space while reducing your energy consumption. With a focus on energy efficiency, this bulb boasts an energy rating of F. Radiant Warm White Glow: The JCB LED bulb emits a warm and inviting 3,000K Warm White light, creating a cozy atmosphere in your home or workspace. The 250 lumens of brightness provide ample illumination for various applications, from ambient lighting to accentuating specific areas. Wide Beam Angle: Designed for versatility, this bulb features a wide 100-degree beam angle, ensuring that the light is distributed evenly across the room. Whether you're highlighting artwork, illuminating a kitchen, or creating a welcoming living space, this GU10 bulb offers broad coverage. Non-Dimmable for Simplicity: This JCB LED GU10 bulb is non-dimmable, offering straightforward on/off operation. It's a perfect choice for spaces where dimming functionality is not required, providing a hassle-free lighting solution. Voltage Compatibility: The JCB GU10 LED bulb operates seamlessly on a standard 220-240V electrical supply, making it easy to install in most settings. Upgrade to the JCB 4w 100deg 3000K Warm White 250lm LED Non-Dimmable GU10 Bulb today for a brighter, more energy-efficient, and long-lasting lighting solution. Illuminate your space with the warm, welcoming glow you desire, and make a positive impact on both your environment and your energy bills.
